about.title: About VNP-WEB
about.subtitle: Discover the story, expertise, and values behind every web project.

who.title: Who am I?
who.p1: I'm Guillaume Pruvost. I've been building web presences that last since 2014. Forget the factory agency where you're just a file number: VNP-WEB is a solo freelance business. Based in Occitanie, France, the operation spans across France, Belgium, Switzerland, Luxembourg, Quebec, and anywhere in the world.
who.p2: The background? A natural curiosity for search algorithms, backed by a dual degree in IT (BTS SIO) and management (BTS MUC). It's not just about coding: the focus is on how your site is going to make you money.

what.title: What I actually do
what.seo: The core business revolves around SEO, GEO optimization, and writing. Content is written and optimized on complex topics to bring ultra-qualified traffic to your site.
what.support: Cleaning up what already exists, pure web integration, and SMO (Social Media Optimization) are also managed. Your brand needs to be solid across all networks, connecting your entire digital ecosystem.
what.wp: Also a WordPress specialist: redesigns, responsive design, mobile optimization. Everything is handled, from the first line of code to going live. If your project needs a different platform, VNP-WEB adapts.
what.translation: Finally, an ENG-FR translation service is offered. Ideal for tackling new markets without ruining your message.

clients.title: Pricing and Workflow
clients.p1: VNP-WEB assists SMEs, artisans, and international players. Distance has never been an obstacle. Communication happens via Meet, Zoom, or async emails.
clients.p2: What stands out in the collaborations? Responsiveness. Available 24/7. The web never sleeps, so availability remains permanent for your digital emergencies.
clients.p3: No rigid pricing grids. A custom price is offered tailored to your project. As a pure indication, the basic rate for web copywriting without integration is €0.04 per word.

why.title: Why VNP-WEB?
why.p1: VNP stands for Visibility, Notoriety, Popularity. A gorgeous website is useless if it remains invisible. The job is to put you in front of the right people.
why.p2: Faced with AI churning out texts endlessly, the priority is 100% human, authentic content with character. Adaptation is the key to web longevity.

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.content1: VNP-WEB strives to ensure the accuracy and updating of the information published on this site, and reserves the right to correct the content at any time and without notice.

liability.content3: Consequently, VNP-WEB declines all responsibility for any imprecision, inaccuracy, or omission concerning information available on this site.

links.title: 7. Hypertext Links
links.content1: The VNP-WEB site may contain links to other websites. VNP-WEB has no means to control these sites and assumes no responsibility for their content.
links.content2: The creation of hypertext links to the VNP-WEB site requires prior written authorization.

law.title: 8. Applicable Law
law.content: These legal notices are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute and in the absence of an amicable agreement, the dispute will be brought before the French courts in accordance with the rules of jurisdiction in force.

case2.challenge: Steady traffic decline following a Google penalty.
case2.solution: Full technical audit, toxic link cleanup, and internal linking overhaul.
case2.result: Returned to page 1 for 5 major keywords in 4 months.

case3.challenge: Need to simplify complex concepts (AI, Data) to attract leads.
case3.solution: Writing 2 expert articles per month with long-tail optimization.
case3.result: +150% organic traffic generated on the blog in one year.
